target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible structural collapse on multiple floors; significant facade damage and exposed internal structure; smoke indicates ongoing effects; damage appears concentrated on upper floors but extends visibly downward.

summary: One building is assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE, PROBABLE confidence, showing visible structural collapse, facade damage, and smoke. The full scene depicts a tall residential building with significant upper-floor destruction, including exposed internal structure and debris, suggesting a catastrophic event. The likely functional impact is complete loss of occupancy and structural integrity in the damaged section.
